steps.title: Spot the defining contrast
steps.content: The word Unlike signals that Hashimoto Kansetsu must have done something opposite to Saeki Yūzō, who adopted traditional European methods.

steps.title: Match the opposite action
steps.content:
Adhered to means followed or stayed true to.

Hashimoto's production of Summer Evening using ink and light color on silk confirms this—traditional Japanese technique aligns with the word's meaning.

The other three choices all contradict or misalign: refrained from suggests avoidance of the very methods Hashimoto used, while awarded and reprimanded are semantically inappropriate.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
